_comment: Solo — two-pane side-by-side layout: main chat (left, 50%) + visual pane (right, 50%). Default layout for new sessions after the visual-pane rollout (WP-2.2, 2026-04-17). The visual pane is always present and subscribes to the main chat's ora-visual blocks; per plan §2 it is collapsible to 0% but not removable.
